---
title: "Alice Hilda Godman"
---

## Alice Hilda Godman

**Dates:** (1875-1925)

### Description

daughter of Percy S. Godman

### Biography

Surrey History Centre has material on the history of the Godman family, some collected by Percy S. Godman.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 16th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
